contentPattern.structure: short label + one-line description (text only, no image, no link)

suitableFor: Quick-Look Benefits / feature-highlight grids that are text only
short label + one-line description items in an even multi-column row
icon-less benefit/feature callout grids on a light background
notSuitableFor: cards with images or thumbnails (use cards-article)
single side-by-side image + text feature rows (use columns-split)
